headline: Three Hedging Strategies For Oil Prices

headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading lower after President Trump announced in a Truth Social post the suspension of U.S. strikes on Iranian power generation and energy infrastructure for five days, subject to the outcome of ongoing discussions.
